the two components will distil in the same proportion as present in the mixture.

subject: Chemistry
q: For a solution in which the amount of ethane is $6.56 \times 10^{-3} \mathrm{~g}$, the partial pressure of ethane is 1 bar. If the amount of ethane in the solution is changed to $5.00 \times 10^{-2} \mathrm{~g}$, its partial pressure becomes p. Find the value of 100p.
